name: Greek Honey Hot Sauce
servings: prep time: 5 minutes | cook time:10 minutes |serves 4

ingredients.item: strained fresh lemon juice, plus more for seasoning
to 3 tablespoons good-quality honey, preferably raw Greek pine honey

method: Place all the ingredients in the bowl of a food processor and puree until smooth.
Taste and season with more lemon juice, hot sauce, and/or salt as needed.
